series_metadata.series_description: Record of grievance case files organized by case number and year for issue grievance, working-out-of-class, and disciplinary grievances. May contain original grievance forms, (ADM-4403 and 4405), and supporting documentation including, but not limited to information on Step 1 and Step 2 filling an responses, copies of classification specifications and position descriptions, grievance settlement or withdrawal information, arbitration decisions and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 7 years or until arbitration is complete. ; Electronic: Retain in office 7 years or until arbitration is complete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
